name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in a sequence *)
AllMessages == Sequence(Message)

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Start"
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Start"
                    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare]) \* for each participant p
                    /\ coordinator' = "Waiting"
                    /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                                      /\ \E m \in messages: /\ m.type = Prepare
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                      /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> VoteYes])
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedYes"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote No *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                                      /\ \E m \in messages: /\ m.type = Prepare
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                      /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> VoteNo])
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedNo"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorCommit == /\ coordinator = "Waiting"
                    /\ \A p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                                      /\ \E m \in messages: /\ m.type = VoteYes
                                                          /\ m.receiver = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.sender = p
                    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p
                    /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
                    /\ participants' = participants

(* Coordinator receives any VoteNo and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorAbort == /\ coordinator = "Waiting"
                    /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                                      /\ \E m \in messages: /\ m.type = VoteNo
                                                          /\ m.receiver = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.sender = p
                    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort]) \* for each participant p
                    /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
                    /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to Committed *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                                      /\ \E m \in messages: /\ m.type = Commit
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
                                      /\ messages' = messages

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to Aborted *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                                      /\ \E m \in messages: /\ m.type = Abort
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
                                      /\ messages' = messages

(* Next-state relation: any of the above actions can occur *)
Next == CoordinatorPrepare \/ ParticipantVoteYes \/ ParticipantVoteNo \/ CoordinatorCommit \/ CoordinatorAbort \/ ParticipantCommit \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant: all variables have correct types *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VotedYes", "VotedNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \in AllMessages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = i /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"

Eat(i) == /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
        /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i

Think(i) == states[i] = "thinking"

TakeLeft(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
TakeRight(i) == forks[RightFork(i)] = i

PutLeft(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
PutRight(i) == forks[RightFork(i)] = i

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "hungry" /\ CanEat(i) /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "eating" /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = i /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
        /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder value *)
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = {}
    /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
    \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
